attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  NICRA.BK_AUDIT_NAME AS BK_AUDIT_NAME,
ST.RULE_ID AS BK_RULE_ID_INT,
NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD AS BK_WORLD_CG_CD,
st.PID_COUNT AS PRODUCT_CNT,
COALESCE(ST.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS SRC_CREATED_DTM,
COALESCE(ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS SRC_UPDATED_DTM,
ST.RULE_CG_COMMENT AS AUDIT_RULE_CG_CMT,
COALESCE(ST.POOL_TARGET_FLAG,'UNKNOWN') AS POOL_TARGET_CD,
ST.DUTY_RATE AS CG_DUTY_RT,
COALESCE( NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS SRC_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE (NCWP1.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY ,-999) AS SRC_UPDT_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NHCRCGL.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY,-999)  AS HTS_CLSFCTN_RULE_KEY,
COALESCE( NHCRCGL1.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY ,-999) AS MDFD_HTS_CLSFCTN_RULE_KEY,
COALESCE(ST.SCORE,'UNKNOWN') AS HTS_MAPPING_TO_CG_SCORE_CD,
COALESCE(NCIS.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'N' as SRC_DELETED_FLG,
ST.ACTION_CODE,
'I'
FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_ADT_RUL_CG_HTS_RES ST
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CLSFTN_RULE_AUDIT NICRA
ON  ST.AUDIT_QUERY_ID = NICRA.SK_AUDIT_QUERY_ID
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG
ON ST.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE =NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS 
 on ST.SPECIFIC_ID =NCIS.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
 ON ST.CREATED_BY=NCWP.CEC_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP1
 ON ST.LAST_UPDATED_BY=NCWP1.CEC_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE NHCR
 ON ST.RULE_ID=NHCR.SK_RULE_ID_INT
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLFTN_RL_CNTY_GRP_LNK NHCRCGL
 ON NHCR.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY=NHCRCGL.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY
AND ST.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE=NHCRCGL.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
and ST.HTS_CODE=NHCRCGL.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE NHCR1
 ON ST.RULE_ID=NHCR1.SK_RULE_ID_INT
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLFTN_RL_CNTY_GRP_LNK NHCRCGL1
 ON NHCR1.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY=NHCRCGL1.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY
AND ST.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE=NHCRCGL1.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
and ST.NEW_HTS_CODE=NHCRCGL1.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD
WHERE ST.AUDIT_QUERY_ID IS NOT NULL
AND ST.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE IS NOT NULL
AND ST.RULE_ID IS NOT NULL
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ST.AUDIT_QUERY_ID, ST.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE,ST.RULE_ID ORDER BY ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1
 UNION
SELECT  NICRA.BK_AUDIT_NAME AS BK_AUDIT_NAME,
EX.RULE_ID AS BK_RULE_ID_INT,
NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD AS BK_WORLD_CG_CD,
EX.PID_COUNT AS PRODUCT_CNT,
COALESCE(EX.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS SRC_CREATED_DTM,
COALESCE(EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS SRC_UPDATED_DTM,
EX.RULE_CG_COMMENT AS AUDIT_RULE_CG_CMT,
COALESCE(EX.POOL_TARGET_FLAG,'UNKNOWN') AS POOL_TARGET_CD,
EX.DUTY_RATE AS CG_DUTY_RT,
COALESCE( NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS SRC_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE (NCWP1.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY ,-999) AS SRC_UPDT_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NHCRCGL.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY,-999)  AS HTS_CLSFCTN_RULE_KEY,
COALESCE( NHCRCGL1.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY ,-999) AS MDFD_HTS_CLSFCTN_RULE_KEY,
COALESCE(EX.SCORE,'UNKNOWN') AS HTS_MAPPING_TO_CG_SCORE_CD,
COALESCE(NCIS.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'N' as SRC_DELETED_FLG,
EX.ACTION_CODE,
'I'
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCFI_CB_ADT_RUL_CG_HTS_RES EX
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CLSFTN_RULE_AUDIT NICRA
ON  EX.AUDIT_QUERY_ID = NICRA.SK_AUDIT_QUERY_ID
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG
ON EX.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE =NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS 
 on EX.SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
 ON EX.CREATED_BY=NCWP.CEC_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP1
 ON EX.LAST_UPDATED_BY=NCWP1.CEC_ID
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE NHCR
 ON EX.RULE_ID=NHCR.SK_RULE_ID_INT
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLFTN_RL_CNTY_GRP_LNK NHCRCGL
 ON NHCR.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY=NHCRCGL.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY
AND EX.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE=NHCRCGL.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
and EX.HTS_CODE=NHCRCGL.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE NHCR1
 ON EX.RULE_ID=NHCR1.SK_RULE_ID_INT
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLFTN_RL_CNTY_GRP_LNK NHCRCGL1
 ON NHCR1.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY=NHCRCGL1.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY
AND EX.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE=NHCRCGL1.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
and EX.NEW_HTS_CODE=NHCRCGL1.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD
WHERE EX.AUDIT_QUERY_ID IS NOT NULL
AND EX.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE IS NOT NULL
AND EX.RULE_ID IS NOT NULL
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EX.AUDIT_QUERY_ID, EX.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE,EX.RULE_ID ORDER BY EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1

SELECT 
AUDIT_RESULT_ID ,
AUDIT_QUERY_ID ,
AUDIT_MONTH ,
AUDIT_YEAR ,
AUDIT_FISCAL_YEAR ,
RULE_ID ,
SPECIFIC_NAME ,
PID_COUNT ,
COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE ,
HTS_CODE ,
DUTY_RATE ,
SCORE ,
RULE_CG_COMMENT ,
POOL_TARGET_FLAG ,
CREATED_BY ,
CREATION_DATE ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
NEW_HTS_CODE ,
AUDIT_PERFORMED ,
SPECIFIC_ID ,
CREATE_DATETIME ,
ACTION_CODE,
'RI' 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_ADT_RUL_CG_HTS_RES ST
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CLSFTN_RULE_AUDIT  NICRA
WHERE NICRA.SK_AUDIT_QUERY_ID = ST.AUDIT_QUERY_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG
WHERE  ST.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE =NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD)
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
WHERE  NCWP.CEC_ID =COALESCE( ST.CREATED_BY,'UNKOWN'))
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP1
WHERE   NCWP1.CEC_ID =COALESCE( ST.LAST_UPDATED_BY,'UNKOWN'))
OR NOT EXISTS (sel 1 from  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS 
 WHERE ST.SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT)
 OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE NHCR
  , $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLFTN_RL_CNTY_GRP_LNK NHCRCGL
 WHERE  NHCR.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY=NHCRCGL.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY
AND ST.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE=NHCRCGL.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
and ST.HTS_CODE=NHCRCGL.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD
AND   ST.RULE_ID=NHCR.SK_RULE_ID_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE NHCR1
 , $$FINLGLVWDB.N_HTS_CLFTN_RL_CNTY_GRP_LNK NHCRCGL1
 WHERE  NHCR1.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY=NHCRCGL1.HTS_CLASSIFICATION_RULE_KEY
AND ST.COUNTRY_GROUP_CODE=NHCRCGL1.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
and ST.NEW_HTS_CODE=NHCRCGL1.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD
 AND ST.RULE_ID=NHCR1.SK_RULE_ID_INT)
